description: A corporate investigator is examining a USB drive (/home/ga/evidence/suspect_seized.dd) suspected of data exfiltration. Identify files on the seized drive that do not match the corporate baseline (/home/ga/evidence/corporate_baseline.dd) by utilizing a 'Known' (not Notable) hash set named 'Corp_Baseline'. Document the analysis in a forensic case named 'Exfiltration_Analysis_2026' (Case Number: INV-EXF-009). Export the MD5 hashes of all allocated files from the baseline image to /home/ga/evidence/baseline_hashes.txt (one hash per line). Generate a pipe-delimited report (with header) of anomalous files—excluding directories and filesystem metadata—to /home/ga
